feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: A Beautiful Wreckage
entry.summary:
Author: sensingowls

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,959Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 21

Summary: Stiles hasn't been back to Beacon Hills in years, but when he senses Something is Up, he makes the decision to go back to help out. Filled with anxiety, he heads back to the trauma filled nightmare that is his hometown, ready to protect his pack, the love of his life and his son.This fic takes huge liberties with the plot of the movie, featuring Sterek who are idiots in love, a magical, BAMF Stiles, and a demon masquerading as the Nogitsune.

entry.title: He Was My Consequence
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,637Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Nerdy, shy Stiles—always buried in books and mocked for it—crosses the wrong line when she exposes campus bad boy Derek after a brutal fight. Suspended because of her, he comes back with one goal: make her life miserable. But when he catches her alone in the restricted library, secretly reading erotic novels—that’s when everything shifts. Teasing, humiliating, pushing her boundaries… until hate and tension blur into something neither of them can control, and the girl he hated becomes the one he can’t stop wanting.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Hales return…….or do they?
entry.summary:
Author: BeaconHills_Sterek

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,910Chapters: 9/10Kudos: 25

Summary: Derek, Cora and Peter hear a rumour that one of the Hales that supposedly died is still alive and in hiding, they set out to find them. The journey takes them farther than they ever thought, will they return victorious or have the hunters damaged the family to a point of no return?————————Read the tags carefully, you have been warned

entry.title: Rising With the Heat Above
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,826Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: clinging on tight
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,578Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: It’s dark in the basement. The only light source is a tiny window high up on the wall. It’s also freezing, like no warmth has ever touched the air. The energy feels dead, haunting, tainted by violence and blood and despair, like even if a ray of sun managed to sneak in through the window, it would hardly make a difference. Stiles shivers where he’s curled up in the corner, the furthest place from the stairs. He wraps his red hoodie tighter around himself, but it’s not doing much good anymore, damp from old blood and tattered in too many places. His jeans feel stiff and restrictive on his body. Beside him, a large black wolf whimpers, the mournful sound leaving his mouth and echoing around the otherwise silent basement. Stiles looks over, his hand already buried in the wolf’s fur, also matted with blood.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,044,652Chapters: 54/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

entry.title: one step backward, two steps forward
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,009Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 32

Summary: "So, let me get this straight..." She said after a moment of silence, eyeing him. "Not only do you want to go back in time to prevent Scott from ever being bitten, you also want me to come with you so that I get bitten in his place?" OR: Stiles came up with a plan to go back in time with Lydia so that Scott never gets bitten, hoping that by doing so they would be able to save a lot of people they loved from pain and strife. They succeeded, to Stiles' surprise—because the idea had always been harebrained and risky and he knew it—so now Stiles has to grapple with what the next step of the plan is. Living in the new timeline he'd helped create and grappling with the ethics of pursuing a relationship with the timeline's Derek Hale, especially because he keeps seeing someone else—an older, more weary wolf from a much crueler timeline—in his shadow.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Time After Time
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,922Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 558

Summary: Talia told Noah about werewolves and the supernatural when he was elected Sheriff. He warned her that was a mistake and she didn't understand why, until she realized that that meant ten year old Stiles knew about werewolves. God help them all.A soft and slow burn story about the five times the Stilinskis saved the Hales over the years, and the one time they were saved right back.

entry.title: Coach’s Dirty Secret
entry.summary:
Author: notyourtipicalauthor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,972Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: After a routine lacrosse practice, Stiles Stilinski is unexpectedly called into Coach Derek Hale’s office, expecting a scolding. Instead, he discovers his supposedly straight, married, and hunky coach has been hiding a very different kind of hunger. Basically, Stiles ends up fucking his hot older coach Derek Hale raw in the school office after practice. The married, muscular coach turns out to be an absolute cock-hungry slut for Stiles’s huge, teenage dick.

entry.title: Out in the open
entry.summary:

entry.title: The Secret Contract
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,436Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Shy, handsome 23-year-old Derek, the awkward son of ridiculously rich parents, has never even had a girlfriend. Worried he’s too timid and inexperienced, his parents secretly hire Stiles, a stunning slutty 30-year-old escort known for turning nervous men into confident lovers. They pay her a fortune for one rule: teach their son about flirting, desire, and sex… but never let him fall in love with her.
